commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Feishu command authorization so admitted senders without command allowFrom get CommandAuthorized=true, adds Feishu tests, and also changes Telegram single-account group fallback behavior with tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main builds an unconfigured command authorizer for Feishu senders with no allowFrom and the shared helper denies it under useAccessGroups. The existing Feishu test currently asserts CommandAuthorized:false for that case; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer scope/changelog cleanup; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's Feishu setup.
